title: Replace assign_new with an explicit refresh on reconnect
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/assign_new_stale_time.ex uses assign_new for :now, which silently preserves the value across reconnects and leaves the clock frozen. Rewrite lib/my_app_web/live/clock_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ClockLive) so :now is freshly computed on every mount — do not use assign_new for it. Keep :render_count via assign_new since it's intended to persist. Tick once per second while connected. mount/3 must use assign (not assign_new) for :now.
tier_rationale: Requires understanding assign_new semantics on reconnect (a lesser-known pitfall).
research_citation: oliver-kriska iron law: 'Never use assign_new for values refreshed every mount'
